title: Internal server error (top_group column in board)
excerpt:
Noticed intermittent error for boards api when we query for top_group property 
  
If I remove this roperty it works fine. 
  
Could you please look into this issue.

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Noticed intermittent error for boards api when we query for top_group property

image1366×768 83.4 KB

If I remove this roperty it works fine.

image1366×768 84.9 KB

Could you please look into this issue.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Yash!

Thanks for bringing this to our attention! we can’t immediately find the root cause and are unable to reproduce this error at this time. However, there could be some issues at play here.

Could you verify that the token you are using has not been regenerated/deleted?

Thank you!

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml: @alessandra I checked here as well as in postman too. Intermittently I noticed this error three four times. Also checked with creating new token.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for that context @Yash!

Would you please send us an email at appsupport@monday.com describing your issue? We need to gather more sensitive account information from you in order to investigate and dive deeper into this issue.
